# Glossary

Canon terms, quick-reference tables, and consistency rules. This file is the fast lookup — when a fact needs a paragraph of context, it belongs in a character/location/book file and gets a one-line pointer here.

---

| Term | Definition | First established |
|------|------------|-------------------|
| [Term] | [What it means in this universe] | [Book/chapter] |

| [Name] | | | | [hidden / hinted / revealed] |

## Consistency Rules

Small, easily-violated facts that don't fit anywhere else. Add a rule here every time an edit pass catches the same mistake twice.

- [e.g., Character X's dog is named ___, not ___]
- [e.g., The name of the bar is styled "The ___" — capital T]
